testcase.name: [1] fill: blue
[2] fill :blue
[3] fill: blue;
[4] ;;fill: blue;;
[5] fill: blue } stroke: red
[6] fill: blue; stroke:
[7] fill: blue; : red
[8] :::;fill:blue;stroke:;:red:
[9] /* Hi */ fill: /* Hi */ blue /* Hi */
[10] fill : blue
[1] :blue
[2] blue:
[3] blue:red
[4] : :blue:red ::
[1] fill: blue !important
[2] fill: blue ! important
[3] fill: blue!important
parse complex stylesheet()
[1] border: 1px solid 'a\';}b' black
[1] fill: blue; stroke: red
[2] fill : blue; stroke:red
[3] ;; fill:blue;stroke:red ;;
[4] ;;:a;:b:;fill:blue;::;stroke:red;;
[5] fill: blue ;stroke :red
[6] fill: blue /* Hi */; stroke: red
[2] *, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[3] rect, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=rect, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[4] #myElem, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=myElem, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[5] .my-class, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[my-class], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[6] :focus, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[focus], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[7] *.my-class, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[my-class], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[8] g.cl1:p1#id1.cl2:p2, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=g, id=id1, classes=[cl1, cl2], pseudoClasses=[p1, p2], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[9] rect , [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=rect, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[10] .:#myElem, [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=myElem, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[])], combinators=[])]
[12] [a], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]

[13] [ ab ], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]

[14] [ab] , [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]

[15] *[ab], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]
[19] [a=], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]

[20] [a= ], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]
[21] [a=b], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=EQUALS, value=b)])], combinators=[])]

[22] [a~=b], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=INCLUDES, value=b)])], combinators=[])]

[23] [a|=b], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=DASH_MATCH, value=b)])], combinators=[])]

[24] [abc=def], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=abc, matcher=EQUALS, value=def)])], combinators=[])]

[25] [ ab = cd ], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=cd)])], combinators=[])]

[26] [ab=''], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=null, value=null)])], combinators=[])]

[27] [ab='cd'], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=cd)])], combinators=[])]

[28] [ab="cd"], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=cd)])], combinators=[])]

[29] [ab='c\'d]e'], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=c'd]e)])], combinators=[])]

[30] [ab="c\"d]e"], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=c"d]e)])], combinators=[])]

[31] [ab= 'cd' ], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=cd)])], combinators=[])]

[32] [ab= c 'de'f], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=ab, matcher=EQUALS, value=de)])], combinators=[])]

[33] path[ a =b][c ~=de ], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=path, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=EQUALS, value=b), AttributeCondition(attribute=c, matcher=INCLUDES, value=de)])], combinators=[])]

[38] g [a=b], [Selector(simpleSelectors=[SimpleSelector(type=g, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[]), SimpleSelector(type=*, id=null, classes=[], pseudoClasses=[], attributeConditions=[AttributeCondition(attribute=a, matcher=EQUALS, value=b)])], combinators=[DESCENDANT])]
